calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 24, 2020 is admitted to probate. Sharon Houser is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for June 8, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
